title: The Perfect Advisors Find Me Easily
subtitle: An affirmation for opening to aligned support in wealth building
excerpt: A brief affirmation from the Day 74 theme of a 12-week money programme. The statement names the flow of support as already in motion: the right advisors, opportunities, and partnerships are finding their way in.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 74 affirmation in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798276631448).

practice.whenToUse: Use when you are ready to bring the right people into your wealth building and want to set the expectation for what those relationships look like.

content.text: A brief affirmation from the Day 74 theme of a 12-week money programme. Day 74 centres on attracting the right advisors and deals. The statement names the alignment as already in motion rather than as something still to be earned.
Say it in the morning, hand on heart. Three times. Notice what the statement does to the picture of what is possible.
The perfect advisors, opportunities, and partnerships align with my vision of generational wealth. They find me easily.
Adapted from the Day 74 affirmation in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
